chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 329 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1281/2023 2. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2023. Mr. Usman Alam, advocate for the petitioner ************ Mr. Muhammad Idrees Jakhrani advocate has effected appearance and files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent / Sindh Revenue Board. It is informed that interim order has been granted by the Commissioner (Appeals). In view of this position, this petition has become infructuous and is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
